birds.evidence: This species is migratory, wintering in East Africa and South Asia, as well as being a resident breeder in Africa and Australasia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: They have a complex migration, with adults departing Siberia in July and juveniles in August to head south, with the majority of the population wintering in Australasia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It breeds in much of Europe and across the Palearctic, but is strictly migratory, with the entire population moving to Africa, India (in particular Santragachi), Bangladesh (in the natural reservoirs of Sylhet district) and Australasia during the winter of the Northern hemisphere, where large flocks can occur
